---
title: "Machine Learning"
subtitle: "my data science portfolio"
---
Machine Learning allows us to uncover patterns, make predictions, and optimize solutions using data. In these projects, I build models that provide actionable insights and demonstrate real-world impact.


## My Approach to Machine Learning

- Data preprocessing and feature engineering  
- Supervised and unsupervised learning  
- Model evaluation, validation, and tuning  
- Using Python libraries: scikit-learn, Pandas, NumPy  
- Visualizing results to communicate model performance


## Projects


**Project 1:** 

**Goal:** Predict wind conditions based on historical weather data.  

**What I Did:**  
- Collected and cleaned data  
- Built regression models to predict wind speed  
- Evaluated performance using RMSE and visualizations  

**Techniques:** Regression, feature engineering, visualization  

[You can veiw the full Project on the side bar to your left]



**Project 2:** 

**Goal:** Predict wind conditions based on historical weather data.  

**What I Did:**  
- Collected and cleaned data  
- Built regression models to predict wind speed  
- Evaluated performance using RMSE and visualizations  

**Techniques:** Regression, feature engineering, visualization  

[You can veiw the full Project on the side bar to your left]



**Project 3:** 

**Goal:** Predict wind conditions based on historical weather data.  

**What I Did:**  
- Collected and cleaned data  
- Built regression models to predict wind speed  
- Evaluated performance using RMSE and visualizations  

**Techniques:** Regression, feature engineering, visualization  

[You can veiw the full Project on the side bar to your left]
